allow: Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); console.log\('lockfileVersion:', lock.lockfileVersion\); const pkgs = Object.keys\(lock.packages || {}\).filter\(k => ['vite','react','react-dom'].some\(p => k.endsWith\('/'+p\)\)\); pkgs.forEach\(k => console.log\(k, lock.packages[k].version\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const lock=JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); const pkgs=Object.keys\(lock.packages||{}\).filter\(k=>['vite','react','react-dom'].some\(p=>k.endsWith\('/'+p\)\)\); pkgs.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, lock.packages[k].version\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const pkgs = Object.keys\(lock.packages || {}\).filter\(k => ['vite','react','react-dom'].some\(p => k.endsWith\('/'+p\)\)\); pkgs.forEach\(k => console.log\(k, lock.packages[k].version\)\)")
